bluetooth_confirm.title: Add Ooni Connect device
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to add **{name}** to Home Assistant?

connection_check.title: Device detected but not reachable
connection_check.description:
**{name}** was detected via Bluetooth (signal strength: {rssi} dBm) but Home Assistant could not establish a connection.

**Error:** `{error}`

The device will be added, but **no sensor data will be visible until a connection is established**.

Common causes:
- **The Ooni app is open on iOS/Android** — close it completely, it blocks other connections
- **Bonding issue** — reset the thermometer to factory settings
- **Not enough Bluetooth proxies** — each proxy has a limited number of simultaneous connection slots; if you have several BLE devices, add more proxies near this device
- **Proxy too far away** — move a proxy closer to the oven

Home Assistant will keep retrying in the background automatically.

abort.no_devices_found: No Ooni devices found nearby. Make sure the device is powered on.
abort.not_ooni_device: This is not an Ooni Connect device
